title: Plan File Frontmatter (Schema T)
description: YAML frontmatter required on specs/plan/<M#>.md files. See technical-spec.md §8.3, FR-44.

kickoff_branch.description: Kickoff branch name; null iff status=draft.

frozen_at.description: ISO datetime the plan was frozen; null iff status=draft (AC-44.3).

allOf.description: status=draft requires both kickoff_branch and frozen_at to be null (AC-44.2)

$comment: status=active|complete SHOULD have kickoff_branch + frozen_at set; migrated plans intentionally leave them null per AC-48.7 — a documented spec exception. /gate-check enforces the tighter invariant at the behavioral layer for non-migrated plans only.
